vocab.meaning: cải thiện sức khỏe hệ tim mạch
vocab.example: I’ve taken up swimming recently because it is an unrivaled way to improve cardiovascular fitness without straining the joints.

vocab.meaning: một bài kiểm tra ý chí
vocab.example: Marathon running is more than just a physical challenge; it is a grueling test of willpower and mental toughness.

vocab.meaning: sự nỗ lực/gắng sức về thể xác
vocab.example: After a long week of sedentary office work, I crave the intense physical exertion that a game of squash provides.

vocab.meaning: nắm vững các nguyên tắc cơ bản/kỹ thuật nền tảng
vocab.example: It took me several months of practice to truly master the fundamentals of golf, such as the grip and the swing.

vocab.meaning: đạt được trạng thái cân bằng (thể chất hoặc tinh thần)
vocab.example: Yoga is my preferred sport because it helps me attain a sense of equilibrium amidst my chaotic schedule.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác và phối hợp trong một đội
vocab.example: What fascinates me about volleyball is the complex team dynamics required to execute a perfect play.
A vigorous workout is guaranteed to release endorphins, which instantly elevates my mood and reduces stress.

vocab.meaning: người nghiện cảm giác mạnh/mạo hiểm
vocab.example: Being a bit of an adrenaline junkie, I’m particularly drawn to extreme sports like paragliding and rock climbing.

vocab.meaning: dùng chiến thuật để vượt mặt đối thủ
vocab.example: Fencing is like high-speed chess; you have to constantly think ahead to outmaneuver the opponent.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn sự kiệt sức (về thể chất/tâm trí)
vocab.example: Engaging in competitive sports on weekends is vital for me to stave off burnout from my high-pressure job.
